matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0010011101 5
1 0000001010 2
2 1111101000 6
3 0110001111 6
4 1011101100 6
5 0011111111 8
6 0010111101 6
7 1111010000 5

67 76 0111010000 4
70 07 0000001010 2 match 1

71 17 0111001000 4

47 74 0011011111 7
